chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1078 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.3133/2025 (C/A) 27.08.2025 Syed Zafar Ali Shah Bukhari, Advocate along with Petitioner Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Shah Muhammad Nasir Rashdi, Administrator, Auqaf Sukkur & Larkana Zone and Aijaz Hussain Channa, Manager Auqaf Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< Pursuant to directions issued on 12.08.2025, learned AAG files authority letter as well statement and compliance report of Contemnor No.2 and the copy of order dated 22.08.2025 under cover of his statement dated 27.08.2025, taken on record. While referring to order dated 22.08.2025, passed by Chief Administrator Auqaf Sindh, learned AAG submits that order passed by this Court has been complied with in letter and spirit, therefore, seeks disposal of listed application. Learned counsel for the petitioner when confronted with the above documents seeks disposal of this application in the light of order dated 22.08.2025 passed by Chief Administrator, Auqaf Sindh. Before parting with this order, it would be appropriate to reproduce the order, which reads as under;- “As per directions of Honourable High Court of Sindh Bench at Sukkur the matter was re-evaluated and conducted that this office order No.AUQ(CAA)Estt:/2025- 388 dated 22.03.2024 regarding cancelation of promotion of Molvi Ashfaque Ahmed Khoso from the post of District Khateeb (BPS-15) issued by Mr. Mumtaz Ali Channa the then Chief Administrator Auqaf Sindh in the light of denial about the signature on the promotion/fixation orders of the petitioner by Mr.

Before parting with this order, it would be appropriate to reproduce the order, which reads as under;- “As per directions of Honourable High Court of Sindh Bench at Sukkur the matter was re-evaluated and conducted that this office order No.AUQ(CAA)Estt:/2025- 388 dated 22.03.2024 regarding cancelation of promotion of Molvi Ashfaque Ahmed Khoso from the post of District Khateeb (BPS-15) issued by Mr. Mumtaz Ali Channa the then Chief Administrator Auqaf Sindh in the light of denial about the signature on the promotion/fixation orders of the petitioner by Mr. Muhammad Sharif Shaikh the Former Chief Administrator Auqaf Sindh as well as approval of Secretary of Administrative Department Government of Sindh, it is genuine and the plea of Molvi Ashfaque Ahmed Khoso holds no merit. However, petitioner is allowed to continue at relegated position as Pesh Imam (BPS-12)” In view of above, the listed application being CMA No.3133/2025 is hereby disposed of. However, the petitioner is at liberty to file proper application or Appeal before the forum having jurisdiction. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
